"C:\Program Files\JetBrains\CLion 2020.3.2\bin\cmake\win\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\0003_Longest_Substring_WRC.dir/objects.a

C:\PROGRA~2\MINGW-~1\I686-8~1.0-P\mingw32\bin\G__~1.EXE -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\0003_Longest_Substring_WRC.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o 0003_Longest_Substring_WRC.exe -Wl,--out-implib,lib0003_Longest_Substring_WRC.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\0003_Longest_Substring_WRC.dir\linklibs.rsp
